intents.text: Add a failing test to reproduce the bug where parallel tool calls hang.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: start by adding a failing test

intents.text: Describes observed behavior: first tool call works but submission hangs; force-quitting shows both failed; sequential with timeout works.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: one tool call is useable (the first one it seems) but on submission / end of that tool call, nothing happens

intents.text: Pull and rebase main branch, install the package, then re-run the tests.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: pull and rebase the main branch + install the package and try again to run the tests

intents.text: Ask whether the same test failure occurs on the main branch.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: is it the same in the main branch?

intents.text: Are tests passing in CI in production? Does the class still exist after the keybind refactor?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: are test passing in the ci in production ? does that class still exist after that keybind refactor

intents.text: Ask what is wrong with the local setup causing test failures.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: what is wrong on my local setup then

intents.text: Verify that the reproducing test fails as expected.
Ask what the proposed fix suggestions are.
Do not implement the `interactive` metadata approach.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: let's not do the `interactive` metadata one

intents.text: Make parallel tool calls run sequentially instead of throwing an error.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: let's not throw, just have them run sequentially

intents.text: Rebuild all workspace packages and re-run vitest.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: re-build all packages from the workspace and try again to run vitest

intents.text: Override the lint/eslint rule in the current context.
Making tool calls sequential didn't fix the issue.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: making tool calls sequential doesn't fix it then

intents.text: Rewrite the failing test to use real code paths instead of mocking/recreating too much.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: rewrite the failing test to use as much stuff from the code as possible and not mock/recrete shit

intents.text: The test should attempt to complete both tool call submissions, not skip them.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: the test should complete both submissions or at least try to
